title: CRC-32 with explicit length (RFC 1952, zlib crc32_z variant)
signature: pub fn crc32_z(crc: u32, buf: &[u8], len: usize) -> u32
notes: zlib's crc32_z takes an explicit length. Uses the reflected IEEE 802.3 CRC-32 polynomial 0xEDB88320. Initial crc=0 starts fresh. Honor min(len, buf.len()) for safe indexing. Assumes CRC32_TABLE is available from zlib-types (256-entry precomputed table).
